inline_comments.message: if the logger not used, no need to import.

As far as remember, we have a naming convention for our caches like in TrustLevelCacheConfig. 

E.g. the cache name has to be like value-Per-key . if the cache Map<alternateId, cmHandleId> then the map name to have cmHandleIdPerAlternateId.

cmHandleIdPerAlternateId | Stores the cm handle id per alternate id.
